notes: This game, as its bretheren require manual installation of the PhysX runtime libraries, as the preparations from Proton do not successfully do this. The best version I could find were the one ones that accompany the "Versis Jack the Ripper" game, which are version PhysX-9.13.0725-SystemSoftware.msi and PhysX-9.13.0604-SystemSoftware-Legacy.msi packages. The same is true for the three games that share the same engine: Sherlock Holmes versus Jack the Ripper, SH: The Awakened - Remastered and SH: Nemesis. Installing the latest legacy PhysX from nVidia also works, but I have had trouble in my main rig (Ryzen 7 1800X, GTX1080)
title: Sherlock Holmes - Nemesis
